title: How to apply - First-time home buyers’ (FTHB) GST/HST rebate - Canada.ca
content:
First-time home buyers' GST/HST rebate
How you apply for the rebate will depend on whether you purchased your home from a builder or built your home yourself. Choose one of the following for details.
- Home purchased from a builder : Option 1 How and when to apply if you purchased a home from a builder or bought a share of the capital stock of a co-op

#### Home purchased from a builder : Option 1
How and when to apply if you purchased a home from a builder or bought a share of the capital stock of a co-op
- Owner-built home : Option 2 How and when to apply if you built your own home or substantially renovated your existing home

#### Owner-built home : Option 2
How and when to apply if you built your own home or substantially renovated your existing home

### Give feedback about this page
